economic_notes: Enterprise Fund includes 0436158 B.C. Ltd., Ts'kw'aylaxw Forest Co. Ltd., and Marble Canyon Forestry Ltd. BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing investments held. Forestry contracts reported as revenue source.
notes: Net debt position of -808,878 at year end, improved from -1,507,744 prior year. Deferred revenue is negative (drawn down) reducing total revenue. Three subsidiaries consolidated via modified equity method as GBEs: 0436158 B.C. Ltd., Ts'kw'aylaxw Forest Co. Ltd., Marble Canyon Forestry Ltd. Capital Programs shows a recovery of -68,328. Operations and Maintenance shows a recovery of -5,028. Financial statements signed June 26, 2023 though auditor report dated March 28, 2022. total_government_transfers estimated as ISC + Province of BC + CMHC + BC Hydro + FNESA + FNHA = 3369598+784053+76352+77467+66537+770338+77467 less double-counted BC Hydro already in ISC bundle — computed as sum of identifiable government sources.
